errors.not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist, was moved, or is no longer available.
errors.server_description: We hit an unexpected problem on our side. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic_description: This request could not be processed. If the problem continues, contact your administrator.
errors.status_403_description: You do not have permission to view this page.
errors.status_419_description: Your session expired. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.status_429_description: You are sending requests too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.status_503_description: The application is temporarily unavailable while maintenance or updates are in progress.
errors.support_hint: If you believe this is a mistake, contact your workspace administrator.
